name: Euler Finance flash-loan exploit
notes: Flash loan + donateToReserves vulnerability. Not a classic LP rug — governance exploit. D02 signal: sudden liquidity removal from Euler pools. Attacker address confirmed on-chain.
research_gaps: EUL token contract address unconfirmed; transaction hash is DAI-drain example only; full drain TX list not extracted.

name: Ronin Network bridge drain
notes: Validator key compromise — ETH + USDC drained via bridge. Second TX: 0xed2c72ef1a552ddaec6dd1f5cddf0b59a8f37f82bdda5257d9c7c37db7bb9b08. Not a token-level rug; bridge exploit.
research_gaps: Bridge contract address not captured. Ronin is a sidechain — chain adapter not implemented. D02 signal applicability is indirect (LP drained on Ethereum side).

name: Wormhole bridge exploit
notes: Fraudulent minting of 120k whETH on Solana via signature verification bypass. Additional bridge TXs: 0xd31b155e259a403ebe69831fae0ec2b4bd33dfa090c43b605a57d5c72c4fbbc7 and 0xacd309b02e4b533484d148de9ab0adf367ed4e70ed751d1ff036152dc3bc0479. Ethereum chain attacker address listed; Solana-side attacker address not captured.
research_gaps: Solana-side attacker address not captured. Bridge exploit — not a typical token honeypot. D01 applicability is indirect.

name: SafeMoon LP drain via public burn()
notes: Contract upgrade exposed public burn() function enabling price manipulation on BSC PancakeSwap pool. Classic LP drain pattern detectable by D02: sudden pool liquidity collapse. Chain: BSC. Token contract confirmed on-chain.
research_gaps: LP pair contract address (PancakeSwap WBNB/SAFEMOON) not captured. Full LP drain TX sequence not extracted.

name: Beanstalk governance flash-loan rug
notes: Flash-loan governance attack. Attacker contract: 0x79224bc0bf70ec34f0ef56ed8251619499a59def. Malicious BIP18 proposal: 0xe5ecf73603d98a0128f05ed30506ac7a663dbb69. Protocol assets drained to attacker via emergency governance. D02 signal: LP fully emptied in single TX.
research_gaps: BEAN token contract address unconfirmed (placeholder above). Attacker contract address confirmed. Governance vector — D02 covers LP drain but not governance path.

name: Harvest Finance flash-loan price manipulation
notes: Flash loan + Curve/Uniswap price manipulation across 32 repetitions. FARM_USDT and FARM_USDC pools drained. Classic price-manipulation sandwich pattern — D13 analog. Token contract: FARM (0xa0246c9032bc3a600820415ae600c6388619a14d).
research_gaps: Multiple attacker TXs not enumerated. Curve pool addresses not captured. D13 target is MEV sandwich; this is a protocol-level vault exploit.

name: Merlin DEX MAGE rug pull — LP drained by devs
notes: Dev rug pull: max approval to Feeto address, LP drained during Liquidity Generation Event. Classic D02 pattern — LP removed by privileged address shortly after launch. Chain: zkSync L2 (not yet supported in chain adapter).
research_gaps: MAGE token contract address not captured. Transaction hash not published in rekt.news article. zkSync is not yet a supported chain.
